markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Vivo Keyd Stars and LOUD each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Vivo Keyd Stars vs LOUD (BO5) - CBLOL Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL Upper bracket quarterfinal 2 match between Vivo Keyd Stars and LOUD in the CBLOL Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 10 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Vivo Keyd Stars" if Vivo Keyd Stars win the match against LOUD.

This market will resolve to "LOUD" if LOUD win the match against Vivo Keyd Stars.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: LOUD holds a commanding 2-0 lead in this CBLOL Split 1 playoffs upper bracket BO5 after dominating Vivo Keyd Stars on the first two maps Saturday, echoing their 2-0 regular season sweep just six days prior on May 3. YoungJae's aggressive top lane plays, including Qiyana and Aatrox carries with high elimination impact, have fueled LOUD's momentum despite their shaky regular season qualification fight. VKS, finishing 6th with a 3-4 record, shows vulnerability in head-to-head matchups—losing both recent series to LOUD—and must mount a reverse sweep for lower bracket survival in the double-elimination format. Trader consensus reflects LOUD's peaking form eyeing an MSI spot, while VKS relies on map adaptability and early-game execution to shift the series.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an overwhelming 77.5% implied probability against a Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, reflecting four months of silence since the company's January confidential filing with no public S-1 registration emerging. Secondary market valuations have compressed to around $7 billion—down sharply from the $15 billion 2021 peak—amid annual recurring revenue of roughly $700 million and persistent monetization challenges tied to its gaming-focused user base of over 200 million monthly actives. The 13.4% odds on a sub-$15 billion closing market cap capture potential down-round pricing if it proceeds, while higher brackets languish below 3% due to weak growth multiples. With mere weeks until resolution, any S-1 filing remains a critical but increasingly improbable catalyst.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chengdu be 23°C or below on May 11?
markets.description:

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chengdu/ZUUU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Will Trump reduce the deficit before 2027?
markets.description:
The U.S. federal budget deficit for September 2025 was $197,949,630,362.16 (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) reports a lower monthly deficit in December 2026 than in September 2025. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source will be the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) published by the U.S. Department of the Treasury (fiscaldata.treasury.gov). The month surplus can be found in the column labeled "Current Month Deficit Surplus Amount" in the the table "Summary of Receipts, Outlays, and Surplus or Deficit” in the MTS (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government).  If no report is published by February 28, 2027, 11:59 PM ET another credible source will be used.

events.title: Will Trump reduce the deficit before 2027?
events.description:
The U.S. federal budget deficit for September 2025 was $197,949,630,362.16 (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) reports a lower monthly deficit in December 2026 than in September 2025. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source will be the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) published by the U.S. Department of the Treasury (fiscaldata.treasury.gov). The month surplus can be found in the column labeled "Current Month Deficit Surplus Amount" in the the table "Summary of Receipts, Outlays, and Surplus or Deficit” in the MTS (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government).  If no report is published by February 28, 2027, 11:59 PM ET another credible source will be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects an 84.5% implied probability for "No," driven by Congressional Budget Office projections showing the fiscal year 2026 federal deficit at $1.9 trillion (5.8% of GDP), with year-to-date figures already exceeding $1 trillion through February amid persistent revenue shortfalls and spending pressures. President Trump's policy mix—extension of 2017 tax cuts adding $1.4 trillion to decade-long deficits, alongside 42% defense spending hikes to $1.5 trillion in the April FY2027 budget proposal—offsets proposed non-defense discretionary cuts, per CBO analysis. Recent tariff policy shifts could further widen shortfalls by $1.1 trillion over ten years, reinforcing fiscal expansion. Key catalysts include final FY2026 Treasury data by September and debt ceiling negotiations.

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

markets.question: Will 50-74 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz between April 27-May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total number of transit calls that IMF Portwatch reports for the Strait of Hormuz for all days from April 27, 2026, through May 3, 2026, inclusive.

Transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as data has been published for the final date in the specified period. If no data has been published for the final date of the specified period within 14 calendar days (ET) after the end of that period, this market will resolve based on data published up to that point.

Revisions to previously published data points made within this market’s timeframe will be considered. Revisions to previously published data points after data is published for the final date of the specified period, however, will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be IMF Portwatch, specifically the transit calls data published for the Strait of Hormuz at https://portwatch.imf.org/pages/cb5856222a5b4105adc6ee7e880a1730, both in the chart and through downloadable files.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 10 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ca/mississauga/CYYZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest Environment Canada forecasts indicate a high near 14°C for Toronto on May 10 under mostly cloudy skies with low precipitation risk, aligning with The Weather Network's 12–14°C outlook amid a cool early-May pattern featuring highs in the low teens over the past week. Trader sentiment clusters tightly around 14–16°C (implied probabilities 16.5–21.5%) due to ensemble forecast variability from models like GFS and ECMWF, where subtle differences in upper-level ridging and frontal timing could yield 1–2°C swings via warmer air advection or increased solar heating if clouds thin. This reflects springtime uncertainty in Great Lakes weather, against a climatological May 10 average high of about 15°C; watch for afternoon updates from official agencies as resolution nears.

markets.question: Will West Ham be relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs are relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club is officially relegated by the English Premier League following the 2025–26 season, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Burnley and Wolverhampton Wanderers have been mathematically relegated from the Premier League after dismal campaigns, leaving one final drop spot with three matchweeks remaining. West Ham United sit 18th on 36 points following a 3-0 thrashing by Brentford, while Tottenham Hotspur climbed to 17th with 37 points on the back of consecutive wins over Aston Villa and Wolves. Nottingham Forest hold 16th on 42 points, bolstered by four victories in their last five, including a 3-1 upset at Chelsea, creating a tight six-point gap to safety amid inferior goal differences. Traders eye remaining fixtures—featuring clashes against top-half sides like Newcastle and Manchester United—for decisive home form, injuries, and momentum shifts in this high-stakes run-in.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the SC-02 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the SC-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Recent GOP-led legislative moves, including a House panel's approval yesterday of a two-month primary delay from June 9 to enable mid-cycle redistricting, have sparked uncertainty around district lines but pose low risk to the Republican hold given unified GOP control of the legislature and governorship. Democratic primary contenders like Robinson II trail sharply at 18.5%, while candidates A and B hover near 50% amid pre-primary jockeying, with Other at 50.5% reflecting minor third-party filings like the Workers Party.

markets.question: Will Letitia James be arrested before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual is arrested by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A qualifying arrest/detention includes:
* Being taken into physical custody by law enforcement authorities (including federal, state, local, military, or international law enforcement)
* Voluntarily surrendering to law enforcement authorities in response to an arrest warrant
* Being formally booked or processed following detention
* Being handcuffed by a state authority and taken to a police station
* Surrendering at a police station or courthouse with their attorney
* Being placed under house arrest or electronic monitoring

The following scenarios will NOT qualify as an arrest/detention
* An arrest warrant being issued but not executed
* Being briefly detained but not arrested (e.g. such as in the South Korean judicial system when an individual is awaiting a judge’s decision on whether to grant a detention warrant)
* Being questioned or interviewed without arrest
* Being named in an indictment without arrest

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the arresting government and law enforcement, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: In South Korea's June 3, 2026 local elections, Daegu mayoral candidates Choo Kyung-ho of the People Power Party (PPP) and Kim Boo-kyum of the Democratic Party (DPK) dominate trader consensus, with Choo at 65% implied probability reflecting the city's status as a conservative stronghold where PPP enjoys higher party support (around 39% vs. DPK's 31% in recent surveys). Nominations finalized in late April have intensified campaigning, with no major disruptions in the last 48 hours, though special counsel probes and voter sentiment on national issues could sway undecideds ahead of election day.

markets.question: Will Russia capture Rai-Oleksandrivka by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if, according to the ISW map, Russia captures the intersection at 48.810403° N, 37.851396° E in Rai-Oleksandrivka, Donetsk Oblast, by the specified date 11:59 PM ET.

The intersection will be considered captured if any part of the intersection is shaded red on the ISW map (https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/36a7f6a6f5a9448496de641cf64bd375) by the resolution date. If the area is not shaded red by the specified date, the market will resolve to “No”.

For any change on the ISW map to qualify for this market’s resolution, the relevant shading indicating Russian control must persist through the next full ISW daily update cycle. If ISW skips a day, shading must persist until the next finalized ISW update is published, regardless of the date. Any continuous shading which reflects either “Assessed Russian Control”, “Assessed Russian Advance In Ukraine”, or “Assessed Russian Gains in the Past 24 Hours” will qualify. “Assessed Russian Infiltration Areas in Ukraine” will not qualify.

If Russia comes into control of this territory as a result of a negotiated settlement, this will qualify for a 'Yes' resolution, regardless of whether it is shaded red in the ISW map. An announcement of a negotiated settlement that gives Russia de jure control will not qualify. Actual control must be established.

Once Russia captures the intersection, any subsequent loss of control will not be considered towards the resolution of this market.

Intersection Location:  https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/Rai-Oleksandrivka1.png 

Intersection Location in Rai-Oleksandrivka: https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/Rai-Oleksandrivka2.png 

Rai-Oleksandrivka Location: https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/Rai-Oleksandrivka3.png

Location on Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/98NiyN9BC3XQfy3N7

The primary resolution source for this market will be the ISW Ukraine map. If the ISW map is rendered unavailable, information from DeepStateMap (https://deepstatemap.live/) may be used. If information from both the ISW and DeepStateMap are rendered permanently unavailable, a consensus of credible reporting may be used.

Note: Any temporary glitches or errors in the map will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ty Masterson holds a trader consensus edge in the Kansas Republican gubernatorial primary set for August 4, driven by his Senate President role and legislative record advancing conservative priorities like election integrity, parental rights in education, and Trump-era policies, as emphasized in his May 4 social media post touting a "model" for other states. Former Governor Jeff Colyer trails closely, leveraging high name recognition from fall 2025 surveys and robust fundraising including multimillion-dollar self-loans reported in January. Businessman Philip Sarnecki draws outsider appeal through heavy self-financing, while recent May 1 scrutiny of kratom-linked donations to Masterson has minimally impacted odds in this competitive, eight-way field ahead of June 1 candidate filing.

markets.description:
The 2026 French Open is scheduled for May 18 - June 7, 2026.

This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after July 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the French Open (https://www.rolandgarros.com/en-us/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors Aryna Sabalenka at 28.5% implied probability as world No. 1 with consistent 2026 form and a breakthrough 2025 Roland Garros semifinal run over Iga Świątek, but the top remains tightly bunched after top seeds including Sabalenka, Rybakina, Gauff, and Świątek suffered early exits at the recent Madrid Open WTA 1000, won by Marta Kostyuk over surging Mirra Andreeva. Świątek trails closely at 23.5% on her unmatched clay-court pedigree as a four-time champion despite a rankings slip to No. 3, while Rybakina's No. 2 steadiness and defending champion Coco Gauff's entry bolster their shares amid Rome's ongoing early-round action. The competitive depth on the grueling surface underscores upset potential in this wide-open field.

markets.question: Will Zack Wheeler win the 2026 NL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 National League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Paul Skenes tops trader consensus for the 2026 NL Cy Young at 36.5% implied probability after tossing eight scoreless innings on 97 pitches against Arizona on May 6, anchoring his NL-leading 5-2 record and 2.36 ERA through eight starts with 46 strikeouts. Yoshinobu Yamamoto sits second at 16.5% on consistent outings like his recent six-inning win over Houston, yielding a 3.09 ERA in the Dodgers' rotation. Shohei Ohtani trails closely at 15.9%, buoyed by early sub-1.00 ERA gems amid managed workload to preserve his two-way role. Cristopher Sánchez (9.5%) and Chris Sale (7.4%) round out contention with 2.42 and 2.20 ERAs, respectively, building on strong Phillies and Braves rotations without recent injury setbacks.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: FURIA vs Heroic (BO3) - PGL Astana Group Stage
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 2 match between FURIA and Heroic in the PGL Astana Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 10 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "FURIA" if FURIA win the match against Heroic.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against FURIA.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Both FURIA and Heroic enter their PGL Astana 2026 Swiss round 2 BO3 matchup at 1-0 after dominant day 1 wins—FURIA crushing Monte 2-0 with a +20 round differential, while Heroic pulled off an upset 2-0 over higher-seeded Aurora led by xfl0ud's multi-kills and nilo's ace and clutches. FURIA, HLTV-ranked #3 with rifler KSCERATO (1.19 rating past three months) anchoring a stable roster including IGL FalleN, yuurih, YEKINDAR, and molodoy, holds a 4-2 all-time head-to-head edge including recent 2-1 BO3 victories in March ESL Pro League and January BLAST Bounty. Heroic (#24) counters with nilo's 1.15 rating and similar map win rates around 50% on Dust2, Inferno, and Ancient, but trails in Nuke proficiency; trader consensus weighs FURIA's ranking and form amid the Swiss system's advancement stakes.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy holds an edge in the Exort Series #25 Main Stage Swiss Round 1 BO3 matchup against Wave Esports, driven by their flawless 3-0 Contenders Stage run (+23 round differential) compared to Wave's grindy 3-1 path. Map vetoes on Dust2, Mirage, and Ancient loom key, with no major patch shifts or roster news altering prep.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Cape Town be 24°C or higher on May 9?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Cape Town International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 9 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Cape Town International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/za/matroosfontein/FACT.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus overwhelmingly favors 19°C as Cape Town's highest temperature today, backed by real-time observations at Cape Town International Airport—the market's resolution source—and South African Weather Service (SAWS) guidance showing fine but cool conditions with maximums around 19–20°C. Persistent high-level clouds, moderate southerly winds, and morning fog have suppressed solar heating, aligning with May climatological averages of 19°C highs amid an approaching cold front set to bring rain and winds from Sunday. Model ensembles confirm limited intensification potential. A challenge would require unexpected clearing and adiabatic warming to 20°C or higher in late afternoon, though evening cloud buildup makes this improbable as final hourly METAR reports finalize the peak.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rep. Mike Collins maintains a commanding lead in the Republican primary for Georgia's U.S. Senate seat challenging incumbent Jon Ossoff, with trader consensus heavily favoring him amid record early voting turnout exceeding 214,000 ballots in the first week through May 6. Recent Atlanta Journal-Constitution polling from early May shows Collins ahead, though over half of likely GOP primary voters remain undecided, bolstering his frontrunner status post the April 26 debate where he countered Rep. Buddy Carter's ethics attacks on his congressional record. Derek Dooley trails in second, buoyed by Gov. Brian Kemp's endorsement and outsider appeal, while Carter lags after mutual barbs highlighted personal controversies. With the May 19 primary 10 days away and a potential June 16 runoff looming if no candidate exceeds 50%, high undecideds and turnout trends underscore the crowded field's dynamics driving Collins' implied probability.

markets.question: Will Putin visit China by May 31?
markets.description:
If Vladimir Putin visits China by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purpose of this market, a "visit" is defined as Putin physically entering the terrestrial or maritime territory of China. Whether or not Putin enters Chinese airspace during the timeframe of this market will have no bearing on this market's resolution.

The primary resolution source for this information will be official information from Vladimir Putin, the Federal Government of Russia, and the Chinese government; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Kremlin aide Yuri Ushakov stated on May 7 that Moscow and Beijing will jointly announce dates for President Vladimir Putin's visit to China, deeming unilateral disclosure "unfriendly," signaling advanced preparations amid deepening bilateral ties. This follows Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's April 15 confirmation of a first-half 2026 trip, potentially mid-May after U.S. President Trump's scheduled May 14-15 summit, and a February videoconference where Putin accepted Xi Jinping's invitation. Traders' 67.5% "Yes" consensus reflects this diplomatic momentum and strategic partnership priorities—bolstered by Xi's April 14 assurances of mutual support—against risks like scheduling shifts or geopolitical escalations in Ukraine and Iran, with three weeks until the May 31 deadline.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description:
The 2028 United States presidential election will be held on Tuesday, November 7, 2028.

This market will resolve to the political party whose candidate is elected the next President of the United States in the 2028 election.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same party. If all three sources haven’t called the race for the same party by the inauguration date (January 20, 2029) this market will resolve based on who is inaugurated.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices Democrats at 60.5% to capture the 2028 US presidency versus 38.5% for Republicans, reflecting a mid-April surge to an all-time high of 61% amid Echelon Insights polling showing shifts in early candidate preferences and GOP slides in congressional markets tied to delays in mass deportations and restraint on Iran escalation. President Trump's term limit creates an open race, with VP JD Vance leading GOP nomination odds around 37% on cross-platform averages, yet Democrats maintain a general election edge in skin-in-the-game pricing. Pivotal 2026 midterms, where Democrats are favored at 87% for House control, loom as a key test of incumbency dynamics and voter turnout in battlegrounds.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Inter Milan enters the Coppa Italia final on May 13 at Rome's Stadio Olimpico as Serie A leaders with 78 points from 33 matches, boasting strong recent form including 3-0 wins over Cagliari and 5-2 against Roma, though injuries to Lautaro Martinez (muscle strain, late April return possible), Alessandro Bastoni (thigh, early May), and Luis Henrique (groin, expected back) test squad depth. Lazio, mid-table ninth with 47 points, advanced past Atalanta in semis via a gritty display hailed by coach Sarri as a "monster" effort, but face injury woes with Ivan Provedel (shoulder), Nicolo Rovella (collarbone), Adam Marusic (calf), and doubts over Daniel Maldini and Tijjani Noslin. Head-to-head favors Inter (21 wins to 13), yet Lazio's home-soil edge and cup unpredictability heighten upset potential amid upcoming league tests like today's Torino-Inter and tomorrow's Lazio-Udinese.

markets.question: Will Jordan McCullough win American Idol Season 24?
markets.description:
The season finale of American Idol is scheduled for May 11, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the individual who wins Season 24 of American Idol.

If for any reason no winner is declared by June 1, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other". In the case of a tie for winner, this market will resolve in favor of the contestant whose name comes first in alphabetical order.

The resolution source for this market will be the live broadcast of the show, American Idol, and ABC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Hannah Harper commands an overwhelming 78.5% implied probability as the American Idol Season 24 frontrunner following her advancement to the Top 3 alongside Jordan McCullough (13.6%) and Keyla Richardson (2.5%) in the May 4 results show, where Chris Tungseth and Braden Rumfelt were eliminated. Her commanding poll leads, including a dominant 27.7% share for "Heads Carolina, Tails California" in recent fan voting, underscore consistent country-bluegrass appeal and judge praise, solidifying trader consensus amid strong precursor momentum from Top 5 Taylor Swift night performances. Jordan gains as a vocal powerhouse with emotional high notes, while eliminated contestants trail at under 2%. All eyes turn to the May 11 three-hour finale featuring duets with stars like Lee Ann Womack for Harper, where America's votes will decide amid packed guest lineup including Alicia Keys and Mötley Crüe.

markets.question: Al Shabab Saudi Club vs. Al Ittihad Saudi Club: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Saudi Professional League game between Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on slstat.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.description: More markets for the Saudi Professional League game, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Al Ittihad sit sixth in the Saudi Pro League table with 42 points from 26 matches, but their recent form has faltered with just one win in the last five games (1W-2D-2L), exacerbated by the winter departures of stars Karim Benzema to Al Hilal and N'Golo Kanté, leaving gaps in attack and midfield amid fan frustration ahead of a King's Cup semi-final. Al Shabab, 12th on 29 points, host at SHG Arena on April 10 showing sharper scoring edge lately (three wins in five, 12 goals), buoyed by home strength despite mid-table position and forward Mohammed Harbush sidelined long-term with a cruciate injury. Al Ittihad hold a strong head-to-head edge, unbeaten in the last five meetings, setting up a competitive Riyadh clash influenced by rest advantages and tactical adjustments.

markets.question: Will David Njoku play for Indianapolis Colts in 2026-27?

eventMetadata.context_description: Free agent tight end David Njoku remains unsigned weeks after the 2026 NFL Draft, fueling tightly bunched trader consensus with Cincinnati Bengals, New York Jets, Indianapolis Colts, Washington Commanders, Atlanta Falcons, Tennessee Titans, and Los Angeles Chargers implied probabilities hovering at 47-49%, reflecting widespread tight end demand, cap space flexibility, and Njoku's Pro Bowl pedigree despite a down 2025 (33 catches, 293 yards, 4 TDs amid Cleveland's QB instability). Recent visits to the Chargers and Baltimore Ravens have edged their odds upward, while his February Instagram farewell to the Browns—coupled with their dead cap hit and replacement signings—drops Cleveland to 24.5%. At age 30 with injury history, Njoku's market stays competitive as teams weigh bounce-back potential in pass-heavy offenses.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Helsinki be 14°C on May 9?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Helsinki Vantaa Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 9 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Helsinki Vantaa Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/fi/vantaa/EFHK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Finnish Meteorological Institute observations at Helsinki-Vantaa Airport station confirm the day's highest temperature reached 14°C during early afternoon hours, driving trader consensus to a near-certain 100% implied probability for this outcome as evening cooling sets in. Updated hourly forecasts from 15:00 onward project stable conditions around 13°C peaking before a steady decline to 9°C by midnight under partly cloudy skies, light southeast winds (4-5 m/s), and low precipitation risk (<10%), limiting further warming potential. Realistic challenges include unexpected clearing skies enhancing insolation for a 1°C spike, though low-cloud persistence and late-day solar angle make this improbable before resolution via official FMI data.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent polls position Senator Flávio Bolsonaro as the clear frontrunner for second place in Brazil's October 4 presidential election first round, with trader consensus at 66.5% implied probability. Surveys from Ideia (May 1-5) and Real Time Big Data (May 2-4) show incumbent President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva leading at 40%, Flávio at 34-36%, and others like Ronaldo Caiado (5%) and Romeu Zema (4-5%) trailing far behind amid a fragmented opposition field. Flávio's rise reflects consolidation of right-wing support after his father Jair Bolsonaro's ineligibility, while Lula's 19.5% second-place odds highlight volatility from 9-11% undecided voters and the 50%+1 runoff threshold. No major shifts in the past week, but campaign momentum and undecideds could tip balances.

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 62.5 in Game 2?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:30PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 63 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.


In Dota 2, a "kill" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.

events.title: Dota 2: Nigma Galaxy vs REKONIX (BO3) - 1win Essence Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against REKONIX.

This market will resolve to "REKONIX" if REKONIX win the match against Nigma Galaxy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nigma Galaxy entered their BO3 clash against REKONIX in 1win Essence I Group B as clear favorites, backed by a veteran roster featuring GH, No!ob, Davai Lama, OmaR, and Rincyq, riding a five-match win streak and world ranking around #20. The European squad's coordinated teamfight execution suited the 7.41c patch meta emphasizing early aggression and objective control. REKONIX, an up-and-coming Indonesian team with players like inYourdreaM, Fbz, and Varizh (world #55), showed group stage promise at 2-2 but faced stylistic mismatches against Nigma's experience. No roster changes or major patch shifts occurred recently, with trader sentiment hinging on Nigma's momentum for top seed advancement versus REKONIX's upset potential through high-risk pickoffs.

markets.question: Hantavirus lab leak confirmed by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any hantavirus case linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is confirmed to have originated from a medical laboratory or research facility by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Confirmation that the hantavirus case originated from a medical laboratory, research facility, diagnostic facility, or other controlled laboratory setting is required. Definitive confirmation that the lab-originated case directly caused the outbreak on the MV Hondius is not required, provided a consensus of credible reporting indicates that the lab-originated case is a possible source of, or is otherwise plausibly connected to, the MV Hondius outbreak.

Investigations, speculation, statements that a lab origin is possible or has not been ruled out, or statements unverified by a consensus of credible reporting will not suffice.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors "No" at 97.2% implied probability for a Hantavirus lab leak confirmation by June 30, driven by official health authorities like WHO and CDC attributing the recent MV Hondius cruise ship cluster—seven cases including three deaths as of early May—to classic zoonotic spillover from Andes strain hantavirus via rodent exposure at an Argentine landfill. No investigations, whistleblowers, or genomic evidence point to laboratory origins, despite rampant online misinformation and echoes of a 2024 Australian vial incident that yielded no leak confirmation. This skin-in-the-game wisdom reflects low pandemic risk assessments, with upset scenarios limited to an improbable late-breaking probe or leaked documents shifting the narrative before deadline.

markets.question: Will Drake have exactly 1 song in the Billboard top 10?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket pins Drake at a near-dead heat between 7 (47%) and 6 (46%) spots in the Billboard Hot 100 top 10, reflecting razor-thin midweek tracking margins ahead of his 'Iceman' album release on May 15. Early sales and streaming data project multiple track debuts from the project, bolstered by recent catalog surges—eight Drake albums climbed the Billboard 200 this week—keeping holdover singles like potential singles buoyant amid strong promotional buzz. Key swing factors include final streaming tallies on Spotify and Apple Music, radio airplay adds, and competition from concurrent releases; historical precedents show Drake's release strategies often yield 5-9 top 10s, but borderline tracks will determine if he cracks 7 or settles at 6 before the chart dated around late May locks.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 77% implied probability against another US sovereign credit rating downgrade before 2027, reflecting stable outlooks from Moody's (Aa1), S&P (AA+), and Fitch (AA+) as affirmed through late April 2026. Robust US GDP growth has offset fiscal deterioration, including debt held by the public surpassing GDP for the first time since World War II in April 2026 and projected fiscal year 2026 deficits near 6% of GDP per CBO estimates. Despite rising Treasury borrowing needs exceeding $2 trillion this year, agencies cite the dollar's reserve currency status and deep capital markets as supportive factors, with no recent negative revisions or debt ceiling brinkmanship shifting sentiment. Key catalysts ahead include mid-year rating reviews and Congressional Budget Office updates on debt trajectory to 120% of GDP by 2036.

events.title: Internazionali BNL d'Italia: Frances Tiafoe vs Ignacio Buse
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Frances Tiafoe and Ignacio Buse in the Internazionali BNL d'Italia, originally scheduled for May 8, 2026 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Frances Tiafoe' if Frances Tiafoe advances against Ignacio Buse.

This market will resolve to 'Ignacio Buse' if Ignacio Buse advances against Frances Tiafoe.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Frances Tiafoe, the No. 20 seed, faces Peruvian qualifier Ignacio Buse in the second round of the Internazionali BNL d'Italia on the clay courts of Rome. Tiafoe enters fresh off a first-round bye, building on his semifinal run at the Houston clay event last month where he pushed Tommy Paul in a thriller, signaling better adaptation to slower surfaces despite his hard-court strengths. Buse, at a career-high ATP No. 58, earned his main-draw spot with straight-sets qualifying wins over Francisco Comesana and Thomas Faurel in the past week, riding momentum on clay more suited to his baseline game. No head-to-head exists; key factors include Tiafoe's explosive power and experience in Masters 1000 events versus Buse's grinding style and rising form, with no reported injuries for either.

markets.question: Will there be no Somaliland parliamentary election before 2027?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are to be scheduled to be held in Somaliland in late March 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Somaliland House of Representatives (Golaha Wakiilada) election. 

If no election takes place by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No election before 2027".

If an election takes place but the results are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will remain open until the certified results are released. If the results are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Somaliland Parliament. 

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Somaliland government, specifically the Somaliland National Electoral Commission (Komishanka Doorashooyinka Qaranka) (slnec.net).

Opposition Waddani leads party odds at 30.2% on its strong post-2024 presidential performance and momentum in key regions, with Justice and Welfare (UCID) trailing at 5.1%; upcoming municipal polls in June could signal further delays or shifts.

markets.question: Will the next Google Gemini model debut at a score of at least 1500?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the next Gemini model released by Google has at least the specified score on the Arena.AI Leaderboard (arena.ai/leaderboard/text) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the date after the day of the release, 12:00 PM ET.  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Results from the "Score" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

If no qualifying score for the specified model is available on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If no qualifying score becomes available by the end of the seventh day following the day of the model’s release, or if no qualifying model release occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

If multiple models are released on the same calendar date or if multiple variants of the qualifying model appear on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at the relevant check time (e.g., base, “Pro,” or “Flash”), the highest-scoring variant will be used for resolution.

A qualifying model must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be either clearly defined and publicly announced as being accessible to the general public or otherwise made publicly accessible and explicitly labeled within the company’s official website. Labeling errors, placeholder text, or version names displayed on the website that do not correspond to a model that is actually accessible to the general public will not qualify.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at arena.ai/leaderboard/text. If this resolution source is unavailable at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If it remains unavailable through the end of the seventh day after a qualifying release, it will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment for the next Google Gemini model's Chatbot Arena debut reflects strong confidence in Google's ongoing AI prowess, driven by Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian's late-April statement that a new version is arriving "very, very soon" with superior benchmark results. Unannounced Gemini variants, including 3.2 Flash, have appeared in stealth testing on LMSYS Arena, mirroring Google's pattern of high-impact blind launches that previously propelled Gemini 3 Pro to a record 1487 Elo. This market will resolve in favor of the constructor team that is officially recognized by Formula 1 as having set the fastest time during the qualifying session for the 2026 F1 Canadian Grand Prix. The market will be settled based on the FIA's official qualifying results, regardless of any subsequent penalties, disqualifications, or changes to the starting grid.

markets.question: Will Partido dos Trabalhadores (PT) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

events.title: Next Brazil Senate Election: Most Seats Won

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Brazilian Senate, not by any federation or coalition it may be a part of.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) at 83% implied probability to win the most seats in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, where 54 seats (two-thirds renewal) are contested across states via plurality vote. Late April polls from Genial/Quaest, AtlasIntel, and Paraná Pesquisas show PL candidates leading or competitive in key battlegrounds like Rio de Janeiro (Cláudio Castro), Paraná (Filipe Barros), Santa Catarina (Carol de Toni, Carlos Bolsonaro), and Midwest states such as Goiás and Mato Grosso, positioning PL for 20-22 seats per projections. This reflects opposition momentum amid Flávio Bolsonaro's tight presidential polls against Lula and Congress's April 30 override of Lula's veto on Jair Bolsonaro's sentencing bill. Republicanos and Podemos trail with strong showings in isolated races like Bahia and Minas Gerais, but PL's breadth dominates; shifts could arise from June party conventions or campaign scandals.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Amsterdam be 19°C on May 10?

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Amsterdam Airport Schiphol Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/nl/schiphol/EHAM.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest KNMI and ECMWF ensemble forecasts project Amsterdam's May 10 high temperature clustering around 16-18°C, driving closely matched market-implied odds with 17°C at 30% reflecting trader consensus on model spread from uncertain cloud cover tied to an approaching Atlantic low and variable North Sea airflow. Recent 24-hour updates, including yesterday's 12Z ECMWF run, show a modest warming shift via strengthening southerly winds and partial ridge influence over northern Europe, boosting 20°C odds to 24.5% despite 40-50% precipitation chances limiting full insolation. Climatological May 10 highs average 16°C at Schiphol Airport, underscoring spring variability; 00Z model cycles and KNMI bulletins expected within hours will sharpen resolution criteria amid inherent short-range uncertainty.

eventMetadata.context_description: Pat Sabatini (21-5, three-fight win streak) meets William Gomis (15-3, one-win streak) in a stylistic featherweight clash on UFC 328's early prelims at Prudential Center, with both fighters hitting 145 lbs at yesterday's weigh-ins absent any reported injuries or withdrawals. Sabatini's elite Brazilian jiu-jitsu and grappling pressure target Gomis' shaky 38% takedown defense, positioning him to hunt submissions after recent victories including a unanimous decision over Chepe Mariscal. Gomis counters with a three-inch height and reach edge (6'0", 73"), relying on knockout power and footwork honed in his September 2025 decision win over Robert Ruchala. This unranked bout's trader consensus reflects Sabatini's momentum versus Gomis' standup advantages in a fight primed for ground control or striking exchanges.

markets.question: Will Cleveland Guardians win the 2026 AL Central title?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2026 MLB American League Central division.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the team whose listed nickname comes first alphabetically.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to be named the 2026 American League Central division champion per the rules of the MLB (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Major League Baseball (https://www.mlb.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump's tie be another color on May 9, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on the predominant color of the tie worn by Donald Trump during his first public appearance during which he wears a tie on the specified date (ET).

The color will be determined based solely on the first publicly available photo or video of the appearance. Reporting of the tie color without photos or videos will not be considered. Subsequent publication of other photos or videos, including those taken earlier, will not affect the resolution.

For the tie to be considered predominantly blue or red, its primary color must be a shade of blue or red, though it may feature other colors as part of a pattern. 

This tie would count as "Blue": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-blue-5ywRT5OXfn-5.jpg

This tie would count as "Red": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-red-a7ObxtpGQcrR.jpg

The following tie has no distinguishable predominant color, and thus would resolve to "Other": 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/donald-trump-tie-color-other-Q8aIgOP7wFs1.jpg

If Donald Trump does not have any public appearance on the specified date, does not wear a tie, or if it is a color not listed among the strike options, the market will resolve to “Other.”

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will US unemployment reach at least 5.0% in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any seasonally adjusted unemployment rate (total unemployed, as a percent of the civilian labor force, official unemployment rate denoted as U-3) reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in an “Employment Situation Report” for a reference month in 2026 is greater than or equal to the listed percentage. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The relevant reports for this market are the Employment Situation Reports for January-December, 2026. This market may not resolve to “No” until the Employment Situation report for December 2026 is released. If no Employment Situation Report for December 2026 is released by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, however, this market will resolve based on all previously published data up to that time. 

The resolution source for this market is the Monthly Employment Situation Report, published by the BLS every month at https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/empsit.htm, specifically the U-3 measure in Table A-15 for each month.

Note: the resolution source for this market reports unemployment to one decimal point. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a peak US unemployment rate of 5.0% as most likely for 2026 at 33% implied probability, reflecting expectations of gradual labor market softening despite recent resilience. The Bureau of Labor Statistics' April 2026 report, released May 8, showed nonfarm payrolls rising 115,000—beating forecasts of 62,000—while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%, matching March's level amid stable jobless claims around 200,000. Federal Reserve March projections and Philadelphia Fed surveys anticipate a modest rise to 4.4-4.5% by Q4 2026, with some private forecasts eyeing 4.7-4.8% peaks amid slowing GDP growth near 1.8%. Key catalysts include upcoming May jobs data on June 6, JOLTS reports, and the June FOMC meeting, where policy stance could influence rate trajectory.

markets.question: Beşiktaş JK vs. Trabzonspor: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Süper Lig game between Beşiktaş JK and Trabzonspor, scheduled for May 9 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Beşiktaş JK and Trabzonspor each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on tff.org. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Beşiktaş JK vs. Trabzonspor - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Süper Lig game, scheduled for May 9 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Beşiktaş hosts Trabzonspor in a pivotal Süper Lig round 33 clash at Tüpraş Stadyumu, with the visitors holding third place and the Black Eagles fourth, both chasing European qualification amid a tight top-four race. Trader sentiment reflects recent stumbles: Beşiktaş dropped points in a goalless home draw against bottom-side Karagümrük on April 27, while Trabzonspor suffered a 2-1 away loss to Konyaspor the same day, halting their momentum after a 2-1 upset over Galatasaray earlier in April. Trabzonspor faces absences like midfielder Okay Yokuşlu (thigh) and defender Stefan Savic (muscle, doubtful), plus meniscus issues for Batagov; Beşiktaş misses Necip Uysal (suspended) and Kartal Yilmaz (injured). Beşiktaş boasts a strong home record and favorable head-to-head edge, but Trabzonspor's away form keeps it competitive.

markets.question: Will "The Devil Wears Prada 2" be the second highest grossing movie of this weekend?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the film which grosses the second most domestically in theaters for the 3 day weekend of May 8 - 10. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on these movies' The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) pages will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day weekend (May 8 - 10) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If more than one movie reports the same gross for the 3-day weekend, this market will resolve in favor of the movie whose title comes first in alphabetical order. 

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by May 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

If no movie plays in theaters during the specified weekend, this market will resolve to "Other".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects razor-thin tracking estimates for the May 8-10 box office frame, with Michael, The Devil Wears Prada 2, and Mortal Kombat 2 deadlocked at 41.5% implied probabilities for second place amid a projected dogfight for the top spot. Michael, fresh off a record-shattering $97 million debut and solid $54 million second-weekend hold, eyes a 30% drop to around $38 million in its third frame, buoyed by enduring fan buzz and family appeal on Mother's Day weekend. The Devil Wears Prada 2, surging past the original's opening with $77 million last weekend, anticipates a standard 47% sophomore decline to $41 million, leveraging Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway's star power and female demos. Newcomer Mortal Kombat 2 tracks $38-46 million in its bow, fueled by gamer presales and Thursday previews near $5.5 million, but faces counterprogramming risks. Friday actuals and Saturday walkups will decide the hierarchy, as Sheep Detectives lags at $17 million projections.
